title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Researchers at Makerere University in Uganda use AI tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for early-onset breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed protein binding sites and narrowed 15,000 candidates to 15 viable targets for lab validation using only a laptop and server.
